messages: Everyone stop what you’re doing and pretend you remembered without Discord reminding you.
Another year older, another year closer to making questionable life choices with confidence.
May your day be full of good vibes, cake, and absolutely zero responsibilities.
You have officially levelled up. Sadly, no skill points were awarded.
Happy birthday! May your loot drops be legendary and your back pain stay uncommon.
Today is your day. We will allow main character energy for 24 hours only.
Congratulations on surviving another year in this chaotic lobby called life.
